name: syncora
description: Syncora - CRM SaaS orienté opérations terrain (monorepo TypeScript).

scripts.backend: docker compose up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:datadog: docker compose --profile datadog up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.backend:microservices: TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true concurrently -n org,users,permissions,fleet,technicians,dossiers,stock,customers,subscriptions,notifications,documents "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/organizations-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/users-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/permissions-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/fleet-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/technicians-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/cases-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/stock-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/customers-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/subscriptions-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/notifications-service" "npm run start:dev -w @syncora/documents-service"
